case_title: HAI BO LEE VS. JAMES CHEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS EXPIRED IN 2018. THIS MATTER IS TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF HAI BO LEE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT JAMES CHEN IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HAI BO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER CSE DISMISSED. MATTER IS TIME BARRED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HAI BO AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JAMES
